末日降临，蓝星游戏化，所有人类得到转职机会。
这些职业五花八门，奇葩程度令人惊叹——美食家、做题家、圣母、海王、学者、小丑、伪人……
而正在某短视频拍摄剧组内混迹的苏羽转职唯一职业【真实·鹈鹕】。
此职业无法得到任何主动技能，但在击杀怪物后，可永久掠夺怪物的属性点以及专长！
霸主级专长【不倒巨像】——生命值提高1000%，受到伤害降低30%！
霸主级专长【高位凌虐】——你的总属性每比敌人高出1点，你对其造成的伤害提高1%！
霸主级专长【生命解放】——每损失1%最大生命值，生命恢复速度增加10%！
……
万千专长汇聚一人之身，哪怕没有任何主动技能，其伟力也足以撼动寰宇。
苏羽：“我承认你那些花里胡哨的主动技能特效很棒，但很可惜，我的数值在你之上。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/06f225a475b8b6836a1a32674193c60c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"九酒归一","author_id":"","book_id":"7609240974656539710","book_name":"末日游戏，我的数值在你之上","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1988人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7609241082513064510","read_count":"1988","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"109395"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"52","tags":"科幻末世,末世,求生,单女主,末日求生,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/06f225a475b8b6836a1a32674193c60c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180990&x-signature=YfXRUp8If58abjoOn3XBL9q8Xk8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4054590602356247","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"52"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201656308CB85FFCED0CBEF366B5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat"
